record.field: { "version": "18.5.10", "sheets": [ { "id": "rep-operations-dashboard", "name": "Dashboard", "colNumber": 8, "rowNumber": 48, "rows": { "0": { "size": 34 }, "2": { "size": 28 }, "14": { "height": 250, "tag": "chart", "data": { "title": { "text": "Credit / return value by rep", "bold": true }, "background": "#FFFFFF", "legendPosition": "top", "metaData": { "groupBy": ["rep_id"], "dateFormat": "mm/dd/yyyy", "timeFormat": "hh:mm:ss", "formulaArgSeparator": ",", "weekStart": 7 } }, "pivots": { "1": { "type": "ODOO", "context": { "group_by": [] }, "domain": [["task_level", "=", "visit"], ["exception_type", "!=", "ok"]], "id": "1", "measures": [ { "id": "task_count", "fieldName": "task_count", "userDefinedName": "Visits" }, { "id": "overdue_count", "fieldName": "overdue_count", "userDefinedName": "Overdue" }, { "id": "missing_worksheet_count", "fieldName": "missing_worksheet_count", "userDefinedName": "Missing Worksheet" } ], "model": "reza.fsm.rep.operation.report", "name": "Exception list", "sortedColumn": { "measure": "task_count", "order": "desc", "domain": [] }, "formulaId": "1", "columns": [{ "fieldName": "exception_type" }], "rows": [{ "fieldName": "rep_id" }], "fieldMatching": {} }, "2": { "type": "ODOO", "context": { "group_by": [] }, "domain": [["task_level", "=", "visit"]], "id": "2", "measures": [ { "id": "done_count", "fieldName": "done_count", "userDefinedName": "Done" }, { "id": "open_count", "fieldName": "open_count", "userDefinedName": "Open" }, { "id": "cancelled_count", "fieldName": "cancelled_count", "userDefinedName": "Cancelled" }, { "id": "credit_return_value", "fieldName": "credit_return_value", "userDefinedName": "Credit / Return Value" } ], "model": "reza.fsm.rep.operation.report", "name": "Rep performance", "sortedColumn": { "measure": "done_count", "order": "desc", "domain": [] }, "formulaId": "2", "columns": [], "rows": [{ "fieldName":
